title: ardisia neohyalina
intro: Ardisia neohyalina is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ardisia neohyalina include the potential treatment of fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an anti-aging agent. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and it can also be found in various herbal preparations, such as capsules and tinctures.
